movie.title: Me Before Me
movie.overview: A young student battling pressure, panic and a demanding father uses a class project to discover that truth — not trophies — might finally set him free.

videos.name: Aku Sebelum Aku | Teaser Resmi | Netflix

aiEnrichment.summary_one_sentence: A pressured young student undertakes a class project that helps him realize honesty, rather than achievement, can free him from anxiety and his demanding father.
aiEnrichment.summary_short: Me Before Me follows a young student overwhelmed by academic pressure, panic attacks, and a demanding father. Through a class project, he begins to explore his true self beyond expectations and trophies. The experience leads him to understand that embracing truth offers relief and freedom. Ultimately, he learns that self-acceptance matters more than external validation.
aiEnrichment.summary_long: Me Before Me introduces a young student struggling under the weight of constant academic and personal pressure. His relationship with his demanding father is strained, as the father pushes him toward success and tangible achievements. The student frequently experiences panic and anxiety, feeling trapped by the expectations placed upon him. As part of his coursework, he is assigned a class project that requires personal reflection and honesty. Reluctantly, he begins the project, using it as a space to confront his fears and the truth of his experiences. Through this process, he examines the cost of living only to please others and collect accolades. Small revelations during the project help him separate his own identity from his father's ambitions. He gradually finds the courage to express his true feelings rather than hide behind performance. By the end, the project becomes a turning point where he accepts that truth, not trophies, is what sets him free. The film closes on a quieter, more hopeful note as he steps away from pressure toward self-understanding.
aiEnrichment.synopsis: Me Before Me is a dramatic coming-of-age story about a young student facing intense pressure from school and a demanding father. As panic and expectation build, a class assignment becomes an unexpected path to self-discovery. The film explores themes of honesty, mental health, and the courage to define oneself outside of achievement. It offers a thoughtful look at how facing the truth can be more liberating than chasing approval.

story_structure.climax: Through the project, the student confronts the truth he has been avoiding and challenges the pressure imposed on him in a pivotal moment of choice.
story_structure.conflict: The student faces internal panic and external expectations from his father, feeling trapped between fulfilling demands and losing his sense of self.
story_structure.resolution: The student begins to release the need for trophies and approval, finding a fragile but real freedom in embracing his truth.
story_structure.introduction: A young student is introduced under the weight of academic pressure and a demanding father, struggling with panic as daily life begins to feel unbearable.
story_structure.risingAction: A class project becomes the student's unexpected path to explore honesty and self-expression, gradually shifting how he sees his worth beyond achievements.
